findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "query_docs_filesystem_n_top" references sensitive artifacts (apikey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "query_docs_filesystem_n_top" appears informational but accepts parameters (command) that enable code/file/secret access.

confidence.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
confidence.detail: Tool "query_docs_filesystem_n_top" appears informational but accepts parameters (command) that enable code/file/secret access.

confidence.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
confidence.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: query_docs_filesystem_n_top · Private data: query_docs_filesystem_n_top · Public sink: submit_feedback · Destructive: query_docs_filesystem_n_top.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: query_docs_filesystem_n_top · Private data: query_docs_filesystem_n_top · Public sink: submit_feedback · Destructive: query_docs_filesystem_n_top

confidence.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
